testing_gaps: No E2E tests for goal-to-path flow (empty state -> type goal -> generate -> preview -> edit -> save)
No E2E tests for auto-placement animation window (<2s) and badge fallback (>2s)
No E2E tests for personalization feedback loop (reorder 3+ times, verify next AI suggestion reflects preferences)
No test for reorder history trimming (50-entry cap, 90-day cutoff)
No test for premium gate at LearningPaths empty state AI goal input (non-premium user sees UpgradeCTA)
generatePathFromGoal tests only cover mock injection path; live API error paths (network timeout, provider error, abort) are untested
No test for personalized wrapper delegation (when preferences unavailable, wrapper calls original function)
No test for CurriculumComposer AI mode edge cases (whitespace-only goal, rapid double-click Generate, dismiss preview without saving)
No test for AILearningPath wrapper page (opens dialog in AI mode, close navigates to /learning-paths)
No unit test for useAutoPlacement hook (accept, dismiss, trigger, elapsed timer, AbortController lifecycle)
